Splide
======

Bundled third-party slider library used by General Slider on the front end.

Version: 4.1.4
License: MIT
Source:  https://github.com/Splidejs/splide
Website: https://splidejs.com/

Files in this folder (splide.min.js, splide.min.css) are the unmodified
distribution builds of the above release. The full, un-minified source code is
available at the GitHub repository linked above.
